name: SingleStore (uvx)
description: Interact with the SingleStore Management API and services through natural language - run SQL, manage workspaces, schedule jobs, and work with notebooks and stage files. Runs locally via uvx.

inputs.label: SingleStore API Key
inputs.description: SingleStore Management API key. Setting this enables API-key authentication and skips the browser OAuth flow (required for headless/container use, optional locally where browser OAuth is the default). Create one in the SingleStore Cloud Portal under Configuration > API keys.

obtain.instructions:
1. Log in to the SingleStore Cloud Portal
2. Select your organization in the navigation pane
3. Go to Configuration > API keys > Active Keys
4. Click 'Create API key'
5. Specify a name and expiration date, then click 'Create'
6. Copy the API key (it is shown only once)

auth.instructions: Create a Management API key in the SingleStore Cloud Portal under Configuration > API keys and set it as MCP_API_KEY. Without it, the server falls back to interactive browser OAuth on start.
